reviews.comment:
Buena atencion. Podes parar a descansar comprar agua gaseosas galletas etc. Ojo kms antes pavimento muy deteriorado.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. You can stop to rest, buy water, soft drinks, cookies, etc. Be aware that the pavement is in very poor condition a few kilometers before the stop.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, deberían incorporar más personal en el full, una sola persona no alcanza a cubrir las demandas principalmente de cafeteria

(Translated by Google)
Good service, they should hire more staff for the full-service area; one person can't meet the demands, especially in the cafeteria.
